qrcode.title: QR Code
qrcode.desc: O ka hatisa 'me o kgomarelle khoutu ena ea QR ho ntho. Ho e skanela ho tla lebisa ka kotloloho ho leqepheng lena.

form.name: Lebitso la Ntho
form.location_placeholder: Batla kapa eketsa sebaka se secha...
form.location_help: Ke hokae ka kamoreng? (mohlala 'Shelf e kaholimo ea kabinete e putsoa')
form.location_public: Bani kaofela ba ka bona sebaka sena
form.location_private: Ke 'na feela ea ka bonang sena
form.location_empty: Ha ho sebaka se hlalositsoeng ka hara kamore ena hajoale. Qala ho thaepa ho etsa e nngwe.
form.visibility_public: E boneha ke malapa ohle a ntlo

messages.quick_add_success: ✓ "{{barcode}}" e ekelletsehang kapele - o ka e hlophisa hamorao
messages.quick_add_fail: ⚠ Ho eketsa kapele ho ile ha hloleha
messages.not_found: ⚠ Sehlahisoa ha se fumanehe ho li-database. U ka batla ho Google.

login.title: Kena
login.subtitle: Laola thepa ea hau ea lapeng ka bohlale
login.terms_beta: mofuta oa BETA: HomeInventory hajoale e tlas'a teko. Ha ho tiiso e fanoeng mabapi le ho tšoarella kapa polokeho ea data ea hau.
login.terms_disclaimer: Tlhokomeliso: Ka ho sebelisa kopo ena, u lumela hore ha u na tokelo ea ho kopa pampiri efe kapa efe bakeng sa tahlehelo ea data, mathata a ho kena, kapa mathata a mang a mahlale.
login.terms_backup: Ho boloka data ka mokhoa o sireletsehileng: Re khothaletsa ka matla ho boloka tlhaiso-leseling ea bohlokoa khafetsa.
login.terms_accept: Ka ho kena, ho nkoang hore u amohetse melao ena.

register.title: Rea u amohela ho HomeInventory
register.subtitle: Theha ak'haonte e ncha kapa u ikopanye le ntlo e teng
register.create_house_desc: 🏠 Ntlo e ncha e tla thehoa 'me u tla fumana Seno se Ikhethang sa Ntlo. Arolelana senotlolo sena le lelapa ho fihlella lethathamo le tšoanang.
register.join_house_desc: 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Kenya Seno sa Ntlo se arolelanoeng le uena ho ikopanya le ntlo e teng. Bo-mmehadi bohle ba nang le senotlolo ba ka fihlella lethathamo le arolelanoeng.
register.house_key_placeholder: Khomarela senotlolo sa lehae sa litlhaku tse 64
register.already_have_account: Na u se u ntse u na le ak'haonte?
register.password_length: Phasewete e tlameha ho ba bonyane litlhaku tse 6
register.key_required: Senotlolo sa Ntlo se hlokahala ho kena ntlong e seng teng

key_created.title: 🎉 Ntlo e Thehiloe!
key_created.subtitle: Boloka senotlolo se ka tlase sebakeng se sireletsehileng
key_created.warning: Tlhokomeliso: Senotlolo sena se tla hlahisoa hang feela. Se arolelane le malapa a hao hore ba ka fihlella thepa e tšoanang.

email_verification.title: 📧 Netefatso ea Email e Hlokahala
email_verification.message: Ak'haonte e entsoe! Ka kopo netefatsa aterese ea hau ea imeile ho kena.
email_verification.step_1: Re romelletse imeile ea netefatso ho <1>{{email}}</1>.
email_verification.step_2: Tobetsa konopo ea <1>"Netefatsa Ak'haonte ea Ka"</1> ka imeileng.
email_verification.spam_note: Hlahloba foldara ea spam/junk haeba imeile e sa fihle.
email_verification.key_note: Tlhokomeliso: Senotlolo sa ntlo ea hao le sona se ile sa romelloa ka imeile. O ka se arolelana le litho tsa lelapa.

forgot_password.title: Forgot Password
forgot_password.subtitle: Start a secure recovery flow to access your account again.
forgot_password.email_success: If an account exists, a password reset link valid for 15 minutes has been sent.
forgot_password.recovery_mode_info: Email is disabled on this server. Continue with the Recovery Key you saved during account setup.

reset_password.title: Reset Password
reset_password.subtitle: Use the secure link to set a new password.
reset_password.missing_token: The password reset link looks incomplete or broken.

recovery_setup.title: Create Recovery Key
recovery_setup.subtitle: Until this is completed, your account is not considered safe for local password recovery.
recovery_setup.warning: This key will only be shown once. Save it in a password manager or another secure offline location.
recovery_setup.account: A recovery key will be created for account {{username}}.
recovery_setup.description: Because email is disabled, you will only be able to reset your password with this key in the future.

recovery_key_modal.subtitle: This key is shown only once.
recovery_key_modal.warning: If you lose this key while email is disabled, you may not be able to recover your password. Copy it and store it safely.

filters.no_items: Ha ho na lintho tse lumellanang le sefa sena

stats.fullest_room: Kamore e feletseng ka ho fetisisa

categories.title: Likhatiso
categories.empty: Ha ho ntho efe kapa efe e ekelitsoeng hajoale

beta_banner.title: BETA:
beta_banner.text: HomeInventory hajoale e le tlas'a teko le karolo ea boithabiso. Ha ho tiiso e fanoang bakeng sa ho boloka data kapa polokeho. Ka kopo boloka litatiki tsa tlhahisoleseling ea bohlokoa.

messages.house_leave_confirm: Na u tiile hore u batla ho tloha "{{name}}"?
messages.backup_downloaded: ✅ Backup e jarollotsoe ka katleho! ({{count}} lintho)
messages.export_error: ❌ Phoso e etsahetse nakong ea ho romela
messages.import_invalid_format: Fomate ea faele ea backup e fosahetse
messages.import_success: ✅ Lintho tsa {{items}}, mekhahlelo ea {{categories}}, kamore tsa {{rooms}}, libaka tsa {{locations}} li ekelletsoe.
messages.password_error_current: Phasewete ea hajoale ha e nepahe
messages.session_expired: Nako ea seise e felile. Ka kopo kena hape.
messages.connection_error: E ne e sa khone ho hokela seva. Hlahloba khokahano ea hau ea inthanete.
messages.unexpected_error: Phoso e sa lebelloang e etsahetse
messages.username_error: E ne e sa khone ho fetola lebitso la mosebedisi
messages.username_len_error: Lebitso la mosebedisi le tlameha ho ba le bonyane litlhaku tse 3
messages.passwords_mismatch: Liphephandaba tse ncha ha li lumellane
messages.password_min_len: Phephandaba e ncha e lokela ho ba le bonyane litlhaku tse 6
messages.member_kick_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove "{{name}}" from the house?
messages.member_kick_error: Could not remove member from the house

my_houses.title: Matlo a Ka
my_houses.no_house: Ha u e-so be setho sa lehae lefe kapa lefe
my_houses.info: 💡 U ka ba le ntlo e 'meli kapa tse fetang 'me ua fetola lipakeng tsa tsona. Ntlo e 'ngoe le e 'ngoe e boloka lethathamo le arohaneng.

house_info.title: Senotlolo sa Ntlo se Sebetsang
house_info.share_info: 💡 Basebedisi bao u arolelanang senotlolo sena le bona ba ka fihlella lethathamo la hao ka ho sebelisa khetho ea "Kena Ntlong" nakong ea ngoliso.
house_info.no_members: Ha ho malapa a mang le hona hona joale
house_info.invite_desc: Arolelana senotlolo sa ntlo ea hao ho lumella malapa ho fihlella lethathamo le lekanang. Memebere e mong le e mong e kena ka akhaonto ea bona empa e fumana data e lekanang.

security.title: Tshireletso
security.change_password_desc: Ntlafatsa phasewete ea ak'haonte ea hau
security.recovery_key_desc: You can generate a new key for local password recovery.
security.recovery_key_missing: No recovery key is visible for this account yet.
security.recovery_key_unavailable: The current recovery key cannot be displayed. Regenerate it if needed.
security.recovery_key_modal_desc: Confirm your current password to continue. The new key will be shown only once.

join_house.title: Kena Ka Ntlo
join_house.key_placeholder: Kenya senotlolo sa ntlo se nang le litlhaku tse 64
join_house.key_help: Kenya senotlolo seo u se fumaneng ho eena oa lelapa la hao
join_house.name_label: Lebitso la Ntlo ena (hae le le teng)

create_house.title: Theha Ntlo e Ncha
create_house.name_placeholder: mohlala: Ntlo ea Lehlabula, Ofisi, Sebaka sa Polokelo
create_house.name_help: Ha e tlasoa, e tla bitsoa "Ntlo ea Ka e Ncha"
create_house.info: ℹ️ Likarolo le likamore tsa mantlha li tla bōptjoa bakeng sa ntlo e ncha. U ka li hlophisa hamorao.

username.title: Fetola lebitso la mosebedisi
username.placeholder: Lebitso la hau le lecha la mosebedisi
username.help: Bangoli ba 3-30, manane a litlhaku, linomoro, underscore le dash feela

inventory.title: Polokelo
inventory.subtitle: {{count}} lintho li fumanoe
inventory.empty_filter: Ha ho lintho tse lumellanang le lifilter tsa hao
inventory.empty_msg: Ha ho lintho tse kentsoeng hajoale
inventory.delete_confirm: Na u tiile hore u batla ho hlakola ntho ena?

categories.title: Likarolo
categories.subtitle: {{count}} likarolo
categories.delete_confirm: Na o na le bonnete ba hore o batla ho hlakola sehlopha sena?

rooms.subtitle: {{count}} liphaposi
rooms.delete_confirm: Na u tiile hore u batla ho hlakola kamore ena?

users.confirm_ban: Na u etsa bonnete ba hore u batla {{status}} mosebelisi enoa?
users.confirm_delete_1: Na u etsa bonnete ba hore u batla ho hlakola mosebelisi "{{username}}"?
users.confirm_delete_2: ⚠️ TSEBISO: Sena se tla hlakola ka HO SA FELENG LITABA TSE TSOHLE (lintho tse bolokiloeng, likamore, mefuta) tsa mosebelisi "{{username}}"!
users.confirm_delete_3: 🚨 TSEBISO EA QETELLO: Ak'haonte "{{username}}" le litaba tsohle li tla hlakoloa ka HO SA KHONE le ho fetola. Na u batla ho tsoelapele?

logs.title: Liofisi tsa Admin
logs.no_logs: ha ho logs leha e le life hajoale
logs.errors_title: Liphoso tsa Sisteme (10 tsa ho qetela)
logs.no_errors: // Sisteme e phetseng hantle, ha ho litlaleho tsa liphoso.

hero.description: Digitize thepa ea hau ea ntlo. Arola lintho, mema lelapa, 'me u fihlelle kae kapa kae. E sejoale-joale, e sireletsehile, ebile ho bonolo ho e sebelisa.

features.title: Hobaneng <1>HomeInventory</1>?
features.subtitle: Likarolo tsohle ho nolofatsa taolo ea ntlo ka sethala se le seng

categorize.title: Arola Lintho
categorize.desc: Hlophisa lintho tsohle ho latela kamore le sehlopha, fumana seo u se hlokang ka metsotsoana.

family.title: Mema Lelapa ka Senotlolo sa Ntlo
family.desc: Memela litho tsa lelapa ka senotlolo sa hau sa lehae se ikhethang, laola thepa mmogo.

access.title: Fumana ho tloha kae kapa kae
access.desc: Leha o le lapeng, mosebetsing, kapa maemong a phomolo - fumana thepa ea hau ka mokhoa o sireletsehileng kae kapa kae.

barcode.title: Kenya Kapele ka Barcode
barcode.desc: Skena li-barcode tsa lihlahisoa, dintlha di tlatsa ka bo eona.

security.title: E Sireletsehile ebile E le Leeme
security.desc: Dintlha tsa hau li a patiloe ebile li sireletsehile ka sebopeho se lumellanang le KVKK.

backup.title: Backup & Export
backup.desc: Kenya kopo ea ho boloka thepa ea hau ka mokhoa oa JSON, khutlisetsa neng kapa neng ha o batla.

cta_bottom.title: Qala ho Sebelisa Hona Joale!
cta_bottom.description: Theha akaunti ea mahala ’me o dijitaise thepa ea lehae la hau. Ngoliso e nka feela metsotsoana e seng mekae.

footer.desc: Sethala se bonolo ebile se sireletsehileng sa ho dijitaise thepa ea lehae la hau.

landing.preview_privacy_notice: Sheba demo: ha ho data ya nnete ya mosebedisi e bontshwa.

inventory.title: Invetori
inventory.content: Mona o ka eketsa le ho hlahisa lenane la lintho tsa hao. Latela lintho tsohle tsa lapeng sebakeng se le seng!

house_key.title: Senotlolo sa Ntlo
house_key.content: Sena ke senotlolo sa ntlo ea hao, se sebedise ho mema ba bang. Eketsa malapa a lelapa la hao ntlong!

categories.title: Dikgatiiso
categories.content: Hlophisa ka ho hlophisa lintho tsa hao ka dikarolo. Elektroniki, fenitshara, kichine, le tse ling!

google_house_select.title: Rea u amohela!
google_house_select.subtitle: O kene ka Google. Joale khetha ntlo.
google_house_select.welcome_options: O ka rata ho etsa eng?

join.title: Kena Ntlong e Se e Etsahetse

google_house_select.house_name_hint: Ha e tletse, e tla bitsoa "Lehae Laka"
google_house_select.house_key_hint: Kenya senotlolo sa litlhaku tse 64 se fumanoeng ho setho sa lelapa
google_house_select.house_name_join: Lebitso la Ntlong ena (ha ho hlokahale)

scanner.title: Sesebediswa sa Barcode
scanner.permission_error: Tumello ea kh'amera e hanetsoe. Hlahloba litlhophiso tsa sebatli.
scanner.busy_error: Kh'amera e hlobahetse. Koala mananeo a mang.
scanner.generic_error: E ne e sa khone ho qala kh'amera.
scanner.found_local_msg: Barcode ena e se e le ho lethathamo la hau la thepa.
scanner.google_result: ⚡ Sephetho sa lipatlisiso sa Google - ka kopo netefatsa
scanner.not_found_db: Khoutu ena ea barcode ha e fumanoe mekgatlong ya data.
scanner.zoom_hint: 💡 Eketsa ho hole le ho tsitsisa mohala
scanner.invalid_qr: Khoutu ena ea QR ha e ea ts'ebeliso ena.
scanner.not_found: Sehlahisoa ha se fumanoe. Leka barcode e fapaneng.

item_qr.hint_mobile: 📱 Skena khoutu ena ea QR ka mohala oa hao ho fumana ntho ena kapele
item_qr.usage_desc: Hatisa khoutu ea QR 'me u e khomarele ho ntho. Skena ka mohala oa hao ho fumana leqephe lena hang-hang!

pending.title: Waiting for house owner approval
pending.description: Your request for "{{house}}" is still waiting for a decision.

no_house.title: You are not connected to a house right now
no_house.description: Create a new house or send a join request to an existing one.

create.title: Create a New House
create.description: Start your own home inventory and continue right away.
create.name_placeholder: e.g. My Home, Summer House, Storage

join.title: Send a Join Request
join.description: Enter a house key and send the request directly to the house owner.
